# samsungcloudplatformv2_iam_group (Data Source)

Show Group

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "samsungcloudplatformv2" {
}

data "samsungcloudplatformv2_iam_group" "group" {
  id = var.id
}


output "group" {
  value = data.samsungcloudplatformv2_iam_group.group
}

variable "id" {
  type    = string
  default = "ENTER YOUR RESOURCE'S ID"
}
```
